contributor_analysis.note: 42% of commits are by the AI agent — the repo is its own test case

temporal_patterns.experiment_cadence: ~30 min per experiment (5 min train + overhead)
temporal_patterns.human_followup: Bug fixes, docs, community PRs in week 2-4

findings.title: AI-human commit ratio nearly 1:1
findings.detail: 25 agent commits vs 29 human commits — rare pattern showing genuine autonomous research

findings.title: Experiment burst pattern
findings.detail: 30 commits in 48h during initial research run, then maintenance mode

findings.title: 8 days since last push
findings.detail: Last activity Mar 25. May indicate experiment cycle complete or maintainer moved on

findings.title: Community engagement shallow
findings.detail: 6 community contributors with 1 commit each — PRs accepted but no sustained contributors

summary: Classic 'brilliant experiment' lifecycle: intense 48h launch burst (half AI-generated), viral adoption, then light maintenance. The 42% AI commit ratio is the repo's thesis proved in its own history.
